title: Display Case
description: Decorative block for beautiful storage of one item
body:
![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/390/23/bezyfdgdfgmyannyj.png)
![](https://i.ibb.co/P1CV3Xq/4.png)
A Display case is a block that can hold one item.

Any item or block can be placed inside the box.

You can stop spinning your display case, when u click on it with Honeycomb, and remove wax with any axe.

Also you can color display case with any dye. 

The case also matches well with chains added in Minecraft 1.16.

This mod can be used for decoration and just for fun.
